payload.message:
Run Meta Graph API analytics pull (read-only) and upload a Google Doc report to Drive folder 'Openclaw Content Analytics'.

Hard rules:
- NO fabrication: Only use Meta API responses. If API/auth fails, send an error-only report.
- Organic-only: do NOT include ads analytics.
- Scope: Instagram + Facebook.
- Output: create a Google Doc in Drive folder ID 17vjnPR3hiwYu5dd0OMQiugZ9IAV-XiGE with title: "<Month D, YYYY> — <hh:mm AM/PM> CT — Meta Analytics (IG + FB)".

Execution:
- Use exec to run: bash /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/workspace-tommy/meta_analytics/bin/research_cron_run.sh
- Token is read from env var META_SYSTEM_USER_TOKEN OR from file /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/credentials/meta/system_user_token.txt.
- If run succeeds, announce ONLY the Google Doc link + 1-line summary (no raw JSON).

You are the Tasklist agent running a scheduled daily backup. Follow these steps EXACTLY in order. Do not skip any step. Do not improvise.

STEP 1: Run the backup script.
- Use the exec tool to run this exact command:
  bash /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/scripts/daily_backup.sh
- Wait for it to finish. It should print lines starting with "-" and end with "Backup completed successfully".

STEP 2: Verify the backup was created.
- Use the exec tool to run this exact command:
  ls -1t /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/backups | head -1
- This shows the most recent backup folder name. It should match today's date.

STEP 3: Check the backup has files.
- Use the exec tool to run this exact command:
  ls /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/backups/$(ls -1t /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/backups | head -1)/
- You should see: openclaw.json and folders like main, tommy, alex-ceo, research, tasklist.

STEP 4: Report the result.
- If all 3 steps succeeded, respond with EXACTLY:
  ✅ Daily backup completed. Folder: [folder name from Step 2]. Files verified.
- If ANY step failed, respond with EXACTLY:
  🛑 Daily backup FAILED at Step [number]. Error: [paste the error message].

Do NOT do anything else. Do NOT install anything. Do NOT modify any files. Just run the script, verify, and report.

Run this command: python3 /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/scripts/check_agent_models.py

If the output is ALL_CLEAR, reply with just: ALL_CLEAR

If the output shows ANY drift or mismatch lines, send a message to Tommy (agent id: tommy) with the exact output and tell him to fix the model assignments. Do NOT attempt to fix anything yourself.

You are Tasklist. Send the daily OPEN ideas digest to Andre.

Steps:
1) Run: python3 /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/workspace-tasklist/scripts/ideas_cli.py list-open
2) Parse JSON.
3) If count=0, output exactly:
OPEN IDEAS (0)
- None
4) If count>0, output exactly:
OPEN IDEAS (<count>)
1. <title> — <description> [id:<id>]
2. ...
Include every open item, no omissions.
5) Do not close/archive anything in this job.

jobs.name: donald-fathom-library-3perday (DISABLED; replaced by donald agent run)

payload.message:
Run Donald daily backlog processing (3 calls/day) from the local Fathom library.

Steps:
1) Use exec to run: python3 /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/scripts/krc/donald_batch_from_library.py --n 3
2) Announce only:
- pending_total
- selected_count
- for each result: client + share_url + run_id

Rules:
- Do not fabricate.
- If any failure occurs, include the failing client + URL + stderr snippet.

Goal: steady daily throughput so Jimmy can draft content for Andre to review at lunch.

You are Donald.

Task: Process the next 3 unprocessed Fathom calls from the local library and produce gold nugget exports.

Steps:
1) Use exec to run: python3 /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/scripts/krc/donald_batch_from_library.py --n 3
2) Parse the JSON.
3) For each result with ok=true, read the raw transcript path from the generated manifest in ~/krc_vault/manifests/<run_id>__manifest.json, then do your SOUL.md nugget extraction and write the real nugget export JSON to:
   ~/krc_vault/gold nugget exports/<run_id>__<Client>__nuggets.json
   (use your normal schema)
4) Announce only:
- pending_total
- list of (client, share_url, run_id)

Rules:
- No fabrication.
- If any transcript fetch fails: include run_id + error.
- Do not write finished content; Jimmy will handle that.

Run the daily Stage-1 Fathom backlog batch (3 calls/day).

Use exec to run:
python3 /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/scripts/krc/donald_batch_from_library.py --n 3

Announce only:
- pending_total
- selected_count
- for each: client + share_url + run_id

Rules:
- No fabrication.
- If any failure occurs: include URL + stderr snippet.

Note: This job produces transcripts + manifests + minimal nugget/objection exports. Donald/Jimmy deeper extraction comes in Stage 2.

Generate daily drafts from the most recent Fathom library batch.

Steps:
1) Use exec to run: python3 /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/scripts/krc/jimmy_batch_from_last.py
2) Parse JSON.
3) Announce ONLY the Drive links for each successful run (from its manifest), one per line.

Rules:
- No fabrication.
- If any run fails: include run_id + error.

Goal: have drafts ready for Andre by lunch.

Send Andre the lunch drafts digest.

Use exec to run:
python3 /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/scripts/krc/daily_lunch_digest.py

Return the output exactly. No extra commentary.

You are Donald (PROSPECTOR). Convert the most recent Fathom batch into REAL exports (not placeholders).

Read batch file:
- /home/openclaw_agent_1/krc_vault/fathom_library/state/last_batch.json

For each result in last_batch where ok=true:
1) Open manifest: ~/krc_vault/manifests/<run_id>__manifest.json
2) Read raw transcript from manifest.raw_transcript_file
3) Produce the FOUR deliverables per your SOUL.md and write to files only:
   A) Call Digest (md)
   B) Nugget Library (JSON)
   C) Objection Bank (JSON)
   D) Handoff Packet (md)

WRITE OUTPUTS USING exec ONLY (NOT write tool), to these vault paths:
- ~/krc_vault/gold nugget exports/<run_id>__<Client>__nuggets.json
- ~/krc_vault/gold nugget exports/<run_id>__<Client>__objections.json
- ~/krc_vault/manifests/<run_id>__<Client>__donald_call_digest.md
- ~/krc_vault/manifests/<run_id>__<Client>__donald_handoff.md

Rules:
- No fabrication. Proof quotes must be redacted but otherwise verbatim.
- Do NOT DM Andre.
- Do NOT message Jimmy.
- Just write files.

CHAT OUTPUT LOCK:
Return EXACTLY one line and nothing else:
DONE run_ids=<comma-separated-runids> ok=<count> fail=<count>

Run deterministic multi-agent marketing routing pipeline from latest Donald nuggets.

Use exec to run:
python3 /home/openclaw_agent_1/.openclaw/scripts/krc/marketing_pipeline_orchestrator.py --n 3

If success:
- announce only: selected, passed, failed, out_file
- then announce first 3 route results (nugget_id + ok/route_to)

If failure:
- announce error + out_file when available

Do not add extra commentary.

jobs.name: Daily 9AM marketing block (DISABLED; inactive marketing team quarantined)

payload.message: Reminder: You have a four-hour marketing/editing block scheduled daily at 9:00 AM Central Time. Use this time to review reels content produced by the marketing team and plan scheduling for the day.
